plugin.name: Install G923 Steering Wheel Mod
plugin.description:
🎮 Cyberpunk 2077 G923 Steering Wheel Mod v3.0.0
This mod adds comprehensive Logitech G923 steering wheel support to Cyberpunk 2077.
🔧 REQUIREMENTS: • Cyberpunk 2077 v2.0+ • Cyber Engine Tweaks (CET) v1.32.0+ (REQUIRED) • Logitech G923 Steering Wheel • Windows 10/11 with DirectInput support
✨ FEATURES: • Real DirectInput hardware communication • 20+ console commands for complete control • Auto-calibration with g923_calibrate("auto") • Vehicle-specific handling optimization • Advanced force feedback system • Performance monitoring and optimization
📁 INSTALLATION: This will install the mod to your CET mods directory: bin/x64/plugins/cyber_engine_tweaks/mods/cyberpunk-g923-mod/
🚀 GETTING STARTED: 1. Connect your G923 wheel 2. Launch Cyberpunk 2077 3. Open CET console (~ key) 4. Type: g923_status() 5. Type: g923_calibrate("auto") 6. Get in any vehicle and drive!
⚠️ IMPORTANT: Ensure Cyber Engine Tweaks is installed first!
